configurations.name: GiftWrapt (dev)
runtimeArgs: export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm"; . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"; nvm use default >/dev/null; exec pnpm dev

configurations.name: Email Preview
runtimeArgs: export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm"; . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"; nvm use default >/dev/null; exec pnpm exec email dev --dir src/emails -p $PORT

configurations.name: Storybook
runtimeArgs: export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm"; . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"; nvm use default >/dev/null; STORYBOOK=true exec pnpm exec storybook dev --no-open --ci -p $PORT
